Visa Services

US Visa Services
H-1B · L-1 · B-2 · F-1 · O-1

Expert US visa consulting for every category. We prepare flawless petitions, coach you for interviews, and respond to RFEs — so your visa gets approved.

Check Visa Eligibility Full Immigration Services

L-1

Visa Categories We Handle

H-1BSpecialty Occupation

For professionals in IT, engineering, finance, medicine, and other specialty fields requiring at least a bachelor's degree.

  • Cap & cap-exempt petitions
  • Premium processing
  • RFE responses
  • Extensions & transfers
  • H-4 dependents
L-1Intracompany Transfer

Transfer executives, managers (L-1A), or specialized knowledge employees (L-1B) from an overseas company.

  • L-1A managerial/executive
  • L-1B specialized knowledge
  • Blanket L petitions
  • New office L-1
  • L-2 dependent EAD
O-1Extraordinary Ability

For individuals with extraordinary ability in sciences, arts, education, business, or athletics.

  • O-1A & O-1B petitions
  • Evidence strategy
  • Advisory opinion letters
  • Extensions
  • O-2 & O-3 dependents
B-1/B-2Visitor / Tourist Visa

Business (B-1) or tourism/medical (B-2) temporary visas. Critical for parents and family visitors.

  • New applications
  • Extension of stay
  • Change to other status
  • Interview preparation
  • Supporting documents
F-1Student Visa

Study at US universities and colleges. Includes OPT and STEM OPT work authorization after graduation.

  • I-20 guidance
  • SEVIS registration
  • OPT / STEM OPT EAD
  • CPT authorization
  • Change of status
EB-1Employment Green Card

Fastest path to permanent residency for extraordinary ability, outstanding researchers, and multinational managers.

  • EB-1A self-petition
  • EB-1B researchers
  • EB-1C executives
  • I-140 filing
  • Concurrent AOS
FAQ

US Visa FAQs

Clear answers on H-1B, L-1, B-2, F-1 and more.

The annual H-1B cap is 65,000 for regular cap plus 20,000 additional for US master's degree holders. USCIS conducts a lottery in March for petitions received during the first five business days of April. Cap-exempt employers (universities, non-profits) can file year-round.
To apply for a B-2 visitor visa from India: (1) Complete DS-160 online application, (2) Pay the $185 MRV fee, (3) Schedule your interview at the US Consulate in Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, or Kolkata, (4) Attend interview with required documents. We help you prepare a strong application package and interview strategy.
Initial H-1B approval is for 3 years, extendable in 3-year increments. If an I-140 immigrant petition is approved, you can extend in 1-year increments beyond the standard 6-year cap. With an approved I-140 and priority date not current, you can extend indefinitely until your green card is approved.
Yes — H-1B portability allows you to change employers after filing an H-1B transfer petition, even before it is approved. The new employer must file an H-1B transfer petition and you must have been maintaining valid status. You can begin working for the new employer as soon as the transfer is filed.
L-1 requires: proof of qualifying employment abroad for 1+ year, proof of managerial/executive role (L-1A) or specialized knowledge (L-1B), organizational charts, job descriptions, evidence of the qualifying relationship between the US and foreign companies, and financial statements. We compile the complete petition package.
